prompt: I already have a game-marketing-context.md set up. We just got our first UA campaign data back and need to update the targeting section. Our CPI on Meta came in at $1.80 in the US and $0.95 in Germany. D7 retention is 18% which is below our 22% target. We also realized our primary audience skews more 25-40 male than our original 18-35 estimate. Can you update the context with these findings?

assertions.text: Reads existing context file before making changes
Updates CPI actuals: US $1.80 and Germany $0.95
Notes D7 retention actual (18%) vs target (22%) gap
Updates target player age range to 25-40 (not 18-35)
Does not rewrite unrelated sections (monetization, store presence, brand voice unchanged)
